name: 💸 |　gtwscar　ꮺ
description:
“ my, my.. you poor little thing. ”

　

pov; you're the mother spore and the mycelium is actually a brain altering fungus that is eating you from the inside out but also giving you the power to control all the fungus around you. the mycelium is also messing with your brain and making you think that you are completely fine and reborn. your body is slowly rotting away even when you're still technically alive though..

mayor scar has just captured you and is trying to detoxify you from the mycelium with decontamination and medicine and normal food since u probably have been just snacking on mycelium or something. he's also trying to get u to confess where the rest of ur resistance is and wants to learn more about how the mycelium is controlling your body. idk this was something my brain came up with last year do what u want. can u tell i couldn't find an icon for this guy????

update: i found an icon for him now only #realones know his past form
creator: vexifyy
